text:
### Notice of proceedings to person with foreign parental responsibility E+W


14.4. —(1) This rule applies where a child is subject to proceedings to which this Part applies and –


(2) [ F17 Subject to paragraph (2A), ] the applicant shall give notice of the proceedings to any parent to whom the applicant believes paragraph (1) applies in any case in which a person who was a parent with parental responsibility under the 1989 Act would be a respondent to the proceedings in accordance with rule 14.3.


[ F18 (2A) Notice shall not be given to a person to whom the applicant believes paragraph (1) applies if the court directs that such notice is not necessary. ]


(3) [ F19 Unless a direction has been made under paragraph (2A), ] the applicant and every respondent to the proceedings shall provide such details as they possess as to the identity and whereabouts of any parent they believe to hold parental responsibility for the child in accordance with paragraph (1) to the court officer, upon making, or responding to the application as appropriate.


(4) Where the existence of such a parent only becomes apparent to a party at a later date during the proceedings, that party must notify the court officer of those details at the earliest opportunity.


(5) Where a parent to whom paragraph (1) applies receives notice of proceedings, that parent may apply to the court to be joined as a party using the Part 18 procedure.


Textual Amendments


F17 Words in rule 14.4(2) inserted (6.4.2020) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/135) , rules 1 , 20(a)


F18 Rule 14.4(2A) inserted (6.4.2020) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/135) , rules 1 , 20(b)


F19 Words in rule 14.4(3) inserted (6.4.2020) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/135) , rules 1 , 20(c)


### Who is to serve E+W


14.5. —(1) The general rules about service in Part 6 are subject to this rule.

metadata.title: Part 14 — Procedure for Applications in Adoption, Placement and Related Proceedings
